svg.title: Data, Storage, and Governance in VIP
svg.desc: VIP Backend splits into three columns: PostgreSQL, MLflow, and Provider Config, each flowing down to their respective outputs.
svg.text: Data, storage, and governance in VIP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the VIP Backend')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about PostgreSQL Metadata Storage')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about MLflow Prompt and Schema Lookup')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Provider Config and model selection')
sendPrompt('What are Apps, Agents, Agent Library, Workflows, and Runtime metadata in VIP?')
sendPrompt('What are Prompt URIs, Schema URIs, and Schema artifacts in VIP?')
sendPrompt('What are OpenAI/Groq, model parameters, and credentials in VIP?')
